reviews.comment:
Muchisimas gracias a Marcos y su esposa que tuvieron la amabilidad de guardarnos la moto para seguridad hasta el día de hoy y el chofer del acarreo anoche q con mucha profesionalidad y amabilidad nos trasladó a nosotros y la moto con mucha responsabilidad observando todo el tiempo que el vehiculo se mantuviera seguro.

(Translated by Google)
Many thanks to Marcos and his wife, who were kind enough to keep our motorcycle safe for us until today, and to the towing driver last night, who very professionally and kindly transported us and the motorcycle, ensuring the vehicle was kept safe.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por tu comentario! Los esperamos nuevamente cuando gusten! ☺️

reviews.comment:
45 mins de cola para cargar, y encima el playero dando vueltas y atendiendo gente que iba con bidones antes de los que hicimos la fila...mal...

(Translated by Google)
45-minute queue to fill up, and on top of that the attendant was wandering around and serving people who had jerrycans ahead of those of us who were in line...bad...

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por tu comentario Pablo. Lamentablemente hayas tenido esta mala experiencia. Seguiremos trabajando para mejorar nuestros servicios...
